Create a web interface using a Bento Grid layout and a Neobrutalist design system.

Layout: 4-column CSS grid with varying card spans (2x2, 2x1, 1x2).

Borders: All elements must have a thick 3px solid black border.

Shadows: Use hard, non-blurred drop shadows (e.g., box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px 0px #000).

Palette: High-contrast background (#fdf6e3) with accent cards in Lime Green, Cyan, and Bright Pink.

Typography: Use a bold Sans-Serif (like Space Grotesk) for headings and a Monospace font (like JetBrains Mono) for data/stats.

Feel: High-energy, raw, and modular. Use Vanilla CSS only."
